heading: Continuation of leases, permits, and licenses
label: 450ii–2 Continuation of leases, permits, and licenses
text: All leases, permits, and licenses issued or authorized by any department, establishment, or agency of the United States, with respect to the Federal lands excluded from the Joshua Tree National Monument by sections 450ii to 450ii–3 of this title, which are in effect on , shall continue in effect, subject to compliance with the terms and conditions therein set forth, until terminated in accordance with the provisions thereof.September 25, 1950
notes: Abolition of Joshua Tree National MonumentJoshua Tree National Monument abolished and incorporated in Joshua Tree National Park, see .section 410aaa–22 of this title
